subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Drink thou of the eternal nectar that floweth from the Divine Word, from the hand of grace, and of the pure Kawthar from the precincts of His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی رحیق باقی از کلمه الهی جاری از دست عطا بیاشام و کوثر اطهر از شطر منظر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
